title: Milosc Rubber Ring Hollow Indoor Outdoor Entrance Mat - Anti Fatigue Non-Slip Safety Floor Mat for Kids Playground, Garden, Grass - Washable Doormat (Pack of 2, 40 x 60 cm)
features: ✔️ Help to stop mud and dirt and other outdoor element entering inside the house
✔️Ensures at on rainy day you are leaving the wet dirt outside the home
✔️Can be laid onto any existing base to create a safe walking environment on flooded or wet areas
✔️As well as serving as effective entrances mats, they are also suitable application in agriculture and stables
✔️Anti-fatigue, designed to reduce fatigue caused by standing for long periods on a hard surface
✔️Great for DIY enthusiasts to use in sheds and garages as a work mat
description: Product description Holo garden mat Safety Warning Always read and follow the manufacturer's instructions for use and care. Keep away from heat sources and sharp objects. Do not use in areas where there is a risk of slipping or falling. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not expose to chemicals or harsh cleaning agents.
